description: Topic calendar for Sasha's twitter-scheduled-post skill. The runtime picks the highest-priority topic with the oldest last_used_at. last_used_at is mirrored from VPS state/calendar-state.json — local treats this file as the priority/topic source, VPS tracks consumption.

rules.weight: higher priority topics chosen first; within a band, oldest last_used_at wins

topics.topic: An onchain receipt from this week — something Sasha actually did or saw in her wallet that has a story behind it
topics.angle: Show, don't tell. Lead with the transaction. Then the take.

topics.topic: Honest take on which AI agent tokens have substance and which are vibes
topics.angle: Specific, not abstract. Name a project, name a metric, draw the line.

topics.topic: Tease an upcoming or recent Token Trends episode — pull one sharp line out of the conversation
topics.angle: One-line hook. The episode is the long-form. The tweet is the door.

topics.topic: Why most DeFi onboarding fails at the wallet step, not the concept step
topics.angle: The tech is fine. The UX assumes you already know what you are doing.

topics.topic: What newcomers get wrong about volatility
topics.angle: Volatility is uncomfortable. Losing your savings on YouTube alpha is devastating. Different risks.

topics.topic: The difference between speculating and investing in crypto
topics.angle: Both are valid. Confusing them is the trap.

topics.topic: Why financial inclusion is crypto's most underdiscussed use case
topics.angle: The actual users are not in the timeline. The timeline talks about itself.

topics.topic: What proof-of-stake actually changed about the energy argument
topics.angle: The argument shifted, not ended. Be precise.

topics.topic: Why most crypto content is built for people who already understand crypto
topics.angle: If you have to know what GMX is to read your own homepage, the homepage is broken.

topics.topic: What the bear market taught Sasha about conviction vs hype
topics.angle: Conviction is what is left when there is no audience.

topics.topic: Why community matters more than technology in early crypto adoption
topics.angle: The first 100 users decide what the next 10,000 understand.

topics.topic: The real reason most people give up on learning DeFi
topics.angle: It is not the math. It is the third Metamask popup.

topics.topic: The one thing every woman Sasha has mentored in crypto needed to hear first
topics.angle: It is not 'you can do this'. It is something more specific. Don't fake the answer.
